org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql.AsyncResultSetExtractor

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql
CQL core support.

  • Uses of AsyncResultSetExtractor in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql

    Classes in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql that implement AsyncResultSetExtractor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static class 
    AsyncCqlTemplate.AsyncRowCallbackHandlerResultSetExtractor
    Adapter to enable use of a RowCallbackHandler inside a ResultSetExtractor.
    class 
    AsyncRowMapperResultSetExtractor<T>
    Adapter implementation of the ResultSetExtractor interface that delegates to a RowMapper which is supposed to create an object for each row.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.cql with parameters of type AsyncResultSetExtractor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    CompletableFuture<T>
    AsyncCqlOperations.query(com.datastax.oss.driver.api.core.cql.Statement<?> statement, AsyncResultSetExtractor<T> resultSetExtractor)
    Execute a query given static CQL, reading the ResultSet with a AsyncResultSetExtractor.

    CompletableFuture<T>
    AsyncCqlOperations.query(String cql, @Nullable PreparedStatementBinder psb, AsyncResultSetExtractor<T> resultSetExtractor)
    Query using a prepared statement, reading the ResultSet with a AsyncResultSetExtractor.

    CompletableFuture<T>
    AsyncCqlOperations.query(String cql, AsyncResultSetExtractor<T> resultSetExtractor)

    CompletableFuture<T>
    AsyncCqlOperations.query(String cql, AsyncResultSetExtractor<T> resultSetExtractor, Object... args)
    Query given CQL to create a prepared statement from CQL and a list of arguments to bind to the query, reading the ResultSet with a AsyncResultSetExtractor.
    <T extends @Nullable Object>
    CompletableFuture<T>
    AsyncCqlOperations.query(AsyncPreparedStatementCreator preparedStatementCreator, @Nullable PreparedStatementBinder psb, AsyncResultSetExtractor<T> resultSetExtractor)
